title: ctenopteris zenkeri
intro: Ctenopteris zenkeri, also known as the Chinese maidenhair, is a type of fern native to East Asia. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Ctenopteris zenkeri include reducing fever, relieving pain, and promoting wound healing. Ctenopteris zenkeri is often prepared as a tea or decoction for its medicinal properties, and can also be used in herbal infusions or as a component of traditional Chinese medicine formulas.
